introSection: Rutschebanen is a wooden roller coaster located at Tivoli Gardens in Copenhagen, Sjælland, Denmark. The roller coaster is the third oldest roller coaster in operation. Rutschebanen in English is "Roller Coaster".

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 3 cars per train. In each car, riders are arranged 2 across in 4 rows, except for the second car which has 3, for a total of 22 riders per train.

fullText:
Rutschebanen is a wooden roller coaster located at Tivoli Gardens in Copenhagen, Sjælland, Denmark. The roller coaster is the third oldest roller coaster in operation. Rutschebanen in English is "Roller Coaster".



3 cars per train. In each car, riders are arranged 2 across in 4 rows, except for the second car which has 3, for a total of 22 riders per train.
